meta_title: For Founders: project management to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Project Management to Solve 'Can't Finish Projects'
content.seo_description: Stop stalling your SaaS. Use this expert-led project management checklist featuring Antigravity and Claude Code to ship your MVP and hit revenue faster.
content.answer_block: The 'can't finish' syndrome stems from scope creep and lack of technical momentum. Solve it by strictly time-boxing your MVP to 14 days, utilizing Claude Code for rapid implementation, and using Antigravity to maintain architectural integrity. Focus exclusively on the core value proposition that drives immediate recurring revenue.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a graveyard of half-baked repositories and abandoned GitHub branches. The vision was clear, but the implementation became a labyrinth of scope creep and technical debt. You aren't failing because you lack ideas; you are failing because you lack a ruthless execution framework that prioritizes shipping over perfection.

Today, we shift from 'tinkering' to 'shipping.' By integrating Antigravity for architectural oversight and Claude Code for rapid iteration, you will transform your development process into a high-velocity engine. This checklist is your blueprint to move from a stalled idea to a monetized SaaS product.

steps.title: Define the 'One-Feature' MVP
steps.description: Identify the single feature that solves the most painful problem for your user. If it doesn't generate value in under 30 seconds, cut it.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project requirements and extract the absolute minimum feature set required for a viable MVP that solves [USER PROBLEM]. Output a strictly prioritized task list.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a project roadmap file focusing only on the core MVP feature identified by Antigravity.'

steps.title: Architect for Speed with Antigravity
steps.description: Use Antigravity to scaffold a robust, scalable foundation so you don't have to refactor mid-sprint.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, modular folder structure and architectural design for a SaaS MVP using [TECH STACK]. Ensure it is optimized for fast deployment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Scaffold the project directory based on the Antigravity architecture specification.'

steps.title: Implement Core Logic via Claude Code
steps.description: Focus on backend logic first. Use Claude Code to build the core engine that handles your primary value proposition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a technical specification for the core business logic handler, including API endpoints and data models for [CORE FEATURE].
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the core business logic defined in the Antigravity spec, ensuring secure API handling.'

steps.title: Automate Frontend Integration
steps.description: Connect your backend to a lean UI. Avoid custom CSS styling until the functionality is verified.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a UI component map that connects the core feature logic to a simple, high-converting dashboard.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate the frontend components based on the Antigravity UI map, using existing API endpoints.'

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Push to production immediately. Your goal is to get the first user to pay, not to achieve perfect code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a deployment checklist for [PLATFORM] to ensure security and performance for the initial launch.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Review the codebase against the Antigravity deployment checklist and prepare for production build.'

pro_tips: Never build authentication from scratch; use a managed provider like Clerk or Supabase to reclaim 20+ hours of dev time.
If a feature takes more than 4 hours to code, break it into four smaller, independently shippable tasks.
Use Claude Code to write your unit tests automatically; it prevents regression bugs that kill your momentum.
Adopt the 'Deploy Friday' rule: force yourself to push code to a live staging environment every single week.
Stop reading documentation for hours; use Antigravity to generate 'how-to' context snippets specific to your current file.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, focus exclusively on acquiring your first 10 paying users through cold outreach before adding any new features.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools and the framework to stop stalling and start earning. It's time to put your project into production and secure your first dollar. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
